About Me

Operational Excellence Meets Platform Integrity

I'm a Trust & Safety and Platform Operations specialist with 8+ years embedded within Meta's family of apps — leading cross-functional teams across APAC and EMEA to deliver platform integrity, civic safety, and partner operations at global scale.

I've managed real-time escalation workflows during the US 2024 Presidential Election, governed a vendor network of 340+, driven workflow expansions that contributed millions in revenue, and built AI-assisted systems that make operations smarter and more scalable.

Currently pursuing an MBA at the University of Birmingham — sharpening my strategic lens as I grow into senior leadership in T&S, Platform Governance, or Civic Tech.

Career

Where I've Made an Impact

Meta Platforms · Singapore
Premier Partner Operations Specialist
Jul 2025 – Present
⭐ Direct Employee · Exceeded Expectations (2025)
  • Own end-to-end Premier Partner escalation management across Facebook and Instagram — primary POC for policy-sensitive and high-priority partner inquiries.
  • Vendor Performance: Improved vendor quality metrics from 87% → 93% through structured governance, RCA initiatives, and targeted training across 340+ vendors.
  • Workflow Transformation: Redesigned Facebook & Instagram Username Change workflows, driving measurable efficiency and scalability gains.
  • Cross-Functional Access Transition: Drove concurrent policy changes, workflow redesigns, and XFN coordination impacting 51 vendors — full operational readiness in 2 weeks.
  • KB Migration: Rebuilt 5 KB articles for Monetisation Appeals, supporting ~219 vendor agents with post-launch gains in resolution speed and CSAT.
  • AI-Assisted Onboarding: Designed 24/7 AI-assisted onboarding system for new joiners, plus integrated visibility dashboards for global on-call coverage.
  • Talent Development: Onboarded and mentored 6 Specialists and 2 Project Managers to full operational independence.
Optimum Solution · Onsite: Meta Platforms · Singapore
Premier Partner Operations Specialist
Jul 2024 – Jun 2025
  • Civic Integrity Leadership: Appointed IPOC Point of Contact for the US 2024 Presidential Election — managing real-time escalation workflows during a globally scrutinised civic event.
  • Government Partnership: Collaborated with Meta's Indonesia Government Partnerships team during the 2024 Indonesia Presidential and General Elections.
  • Operational Transformation: Led concurrent initiatives including IG Merge, Facebook Username Change migration, and Resolvability Framework Analysis for MBR reporting.
  • Successfully transitioned to Meta direct employment following sustained operational impact and stakeholder trust.
Accenture · Onsite: Meta Platforms · Singapore
Senior Operation Lead → BPI Specialist → Media Integrity Analyst
Oct 2017 – Jun 2023
  • Managed Premier Partner Support and Music Research teams across APAC & EMEA — driving performance, quality governance, and SLA delivery.
  • Team Growth: Expanded workflows by 243%, growing the team 18 → 39 members; contributed to $2.71M annual revenue increase.
  • Maintained 99% average QA score across all workflows, consistently exceeding client benchmarks.
  • Process Efficiency: Reduced lead time by 20–40%, decreased errors by ~16%, and expanded workflows 700% (5 → 18 members, $1.75M revenue contribution).
  • Promoted from Media Integrity Analyst → BPI Specialist within 12 months.

Case Studies

Initiatives That Moved the Needle

01 / Civic Integrity

Multi-Event Election & Crisis Operations — APAC POC

Appointed as APAC Point of Contact across multiple high-scrutiny civic and geopolitical events, managing live escalation workflows and cross-functional coordination. Deployed specialist response teams and maintained zero-incident outcomes under real-time operational pressure.

Civic Integrity Crisis Ops Escalation Mgmt XFN Coordination
02 / AI Enablement

AI-Assisted Onboarding & Workflow Enablement System

Designed and implemented an AI-assisted onboarding system providing 24/7 support, milestone tracking, and workflow guidance for new vendor joiners. Built integrated visibility dashboards consolidating global coverage, leave, and public holiday tracking.

AI Tooling Workflow Design Operational Visibility Vendor Enablement
03 / Knowledge Management

Monetisation Appeals Knowledge Base Migration

Led end-to-end KB development for restructured Monetisation Appeals — designing content architecture, rebuilding 5 articles from source, and delivering on schedule for ~219 vendor agents, with measurable post-launch gains in resolution speed and CSAT.

Knowledge Mgmt Content Architecture Change Management CSAT Improvement
04 / Government Partnership

High-Profile Public Sector Platform Launch — White-Glove Support

Provided dedicated live support for a senior government partner's platform rebrand and launch, resolving technical issues after hours and under time pressure. Received formal recognition from senior government officials for cross-functional responsiveness and resolution.

White-Glove Support Government Partnership Incident Management XFN Collaboration
05 / Operational Transition

Large-Scale Access Restriction — Rapid Change Execution

Led end-to-end operational readiness for a major access restriction rollout affecting 50+ vendors — coordinating policy updates, workflow redesign, tooling changes, and XFN alignment. Delivered full transition within a two-week window with minimal operational disruption.

Change Management XFN Coordination Operational Readiness Risk Management
06 / Vendor Performance

IRT & TRT Improvement Programme — 340+ Vendors

Drove measurable improvements in vendor response and resolution times across a 340+ vendor network through structured ticket deep-dives, root cause analysis, and targeted training materials. Partnered with vendors to build RCAs and sustainable improvement plans.

Vendor Management Quality Improvement RCA Training & Enablement
07 / Data & Reporting

CSAT Resolvability Framework — Leadership MBR

Built a structured CSAT analysis process converting raw ticket data into actionable monthly insights for leadership reporting. Optimised dashboards to eliminate ~4 FTE hours/month of manual effort and trained team members to scale the framework independently.

Data Analytics Reporting Process Automation Stakeholder Insights
08 / Workflow Migration

IG Merge FTE-to-Vendor Transition — 28 FTE Hours Saved Monthly

Identified and migrated internal workflows to vendor operations, recovering 28 FTE hours/month and improving workflow quality by 14.83%. Enabled internal teams to redirect capacity toward higher-complexity work.

Process Migration Quality Assurance Capacity Planning Operational Efficiency
09 / Queue Optimisation

Data-Led Threshold Adjustment — 5% to 30–40% Case Viability

Analysed a sample of 300–400 tickets to identify patterns distinguishing actionable from non-actionable requests. Adjusted operational thresholds based on findings, increasing viable case rates from under 5% to 30–40% and improving partner experience.

Data Analysis Queue Management Process Optimisation Partner Experience
10 / Organisational Change

Policy-to-Product Workflow Transformation — Team of 38

Spearheaded a full team migration from policy-based to product-based workflows during a major client restructure, mapping agent capabilities and building tailored training plans. Maintained quality scores above 95% throughout the transition.

Change Management Workflow Design Capability Building Quality Assurance
11 / Process Governance

Cross-Regional Approval Workflow Simplification

Identified unnecessary approval bottlenecks in a cross-regional verification workflow and led a project to deprecate low-risk steps through alignment with Legal and Policy stakeholders. Reduced friction and improved processing speed without compromising compliance.

Process Improvement Governance XFN Collaboration Operational Efficiency
12 / Talent Development

Leadership Pipeline & High-Potential Grooming Programme

Identified and developed high-potential team members through structured coaching, progress tracking, and formal leadership programme participation. Built a sustainable pipeline of 3–5 trainers and mentored 4 new and emerging leads.

Talent Development Leadership Coaching Knowledge Transfer Team Growth
